Video.summary: Professor McNabb discusses the foundation for medieval views of sex and sexuality.
Video.grandparentTitle: Sex in the Middle Ages
Video.title: The Ins and Outs of Sex in the Middle Ages

Image.alt: The Ins and Outs of Sex in the Middle Ages
The Ins and Outs of Sex in the Middle Ages
The Ins and Outs of Sex in the Middle Ages

Video.summary: Consider medieval ideas about procreation and see how everyday people thought about their own bodies.
Video.grandparentTitle: Sex in the Middle Ages
Video.title: Let’s Talk about Medieval Sex, Baby

Image.alt: Let’s Talk about Medieval Sex, Baby
Let’s Talk about Medieval Sex, Baby
Let’s Talk about Medieval Sex, Baby

Video.summary: Find out what medieval people did behind closed doors and see what could happen when they broke the rules.
Video.grandparentTitle: Sex in the Middle Ages
Video.title: Breaking the Rules of Medieval Sex Taboos

Image.alt: Breaking the Rules of Medieval Sex Taboos
Breaking the Rules of Medieval Sex Taboos
Breaking the Rules of Medieval Sex Taboos

Video.summary: Consider the influence of the Church, the clergy, and clerical lawyers on marriage and sexuality.
Video.grandparentTitle: Sex in the Middle Ages
Video.title: Sex and the Medieval Church

Image.alt: Sex and the Medieval Church
Sex and the Medieval Church
Sex and the Medieval Church

Video.summary: Dig deeper into issues of status and gender as you consider forbidden liaisons and sexual violence.
Video.grandparentTitle: Sex in the Middle Ages
Video.title: Sex, Status, and Violence in the Middle Ages

Image.alt: Sex, Status, and Violence in the Middle Ages
Sex, Status, and Violence in the Middle Ages
Sex, Status, and Violence in the Middle Ages

Video.summary: See how medieval literature plays a powerful role in shaping modern perceptions of life in the Middle Ages.
Video.grandparentTitle: Sex in the Middle Ages
Video.title: Medieval Fabliaux and Obscene Literature

Image.alt: Medieval Fabliaux and Obscene Literature
Medieval Fabliaux and Obscene Literature
Medieval Fabliaux and Obscene Literature

Video.summary: Continue your examination of medieval literature by studying courtly love in some of its most famous forms.
Video.grandparentTitle: Sex in the Middle Ages
Video.title: Medieval Romances and Courtly Love

Image.alt: Medieval Romances and Courtly Love
Medieval Romances and Courtly Love
Medieval Romances and Courtly Love

Video.summary: Examine the rules—and double standards—of sex among the monarchs and aristocrats of the Middle Ages.
Video.grandparentTitle: Sex in the Middle Ages
Video.title: Sex Lives of the Medieval Rich and Famous

Image.alt: Sex Lives of the Medieval Rich and Famous
Sex Lives of the Medieval Rich and Famous
Sex Lives of the Medieval Rich and Famous

Video.summary: Kick off the course by getting to know Cimon, a Greek politician and military general, who helped transform Athens into a world power.
Video.grandparentTitle: Unsung Heroes of the Ancient World
Video.title: Cimon of Athens: From Glory to Disgrace

Image.alt: Cimon of Athens: From Glory to Disgrace
Cimon of Athens: From Glory to Disgrace
Cimon of Athens: From Glory to Disgrace

Video.summary: Survey the tremendous military, economic, and material successes that transformed Samos from a sleepy island to a major regional power under his leadership.
Video.grandparentTitle: Unsung Heroes of the Ancient World
Video.title: Polycrates of Samos: The Tale of a Tyrant

Image.alt: Polycrates of Samos: The Tale of a Tyrant
Polycrates of Samos: The Tale of a Tyrant
Polycrates of Samos: The Tale of a Tyrant

Video.summary: See how Epaminondas organized a potent fighting force in his home region to throw off the yoke of Spartan oppression.
Video.grandparentTitle: Unsung Heroes of the Ancient World
Video.title: Epanimondas of Thebes: Slayer of the Spartans

Image.alt: Epanimondas of Thebes: Slayer of the Spartans
Epanimondas of Thebes: Slayer of the Spartans
Epanimondas of Thebes: Slayer of the Spartans

Video.summary: Turn your attention to two obscure Alexandrian inventors: Ctesibius and Hero.
Video.grandparentTitle: Unsung Heroes of the Ancient World
Video.title: Ctesibius and Hero: Alexandrian Inventors

Image.alt: Ctesibius and Hero: Alexandrian Inventors
Ctesibius and Hero: Alexandrian Inventors
Ctesibius and Hero: Alexandrian Inventors

Video.summary: Get to know some of the amateur sportsmen who dominated athletics thousands of years ago, like the skilled wrestler Milo of Croton, the powerful boxer Theagenes of Thasos, the Diagoras of Rhodes sports dynasty, and master long-jumper Phayllus of Croton.
Video.grandparentTitle: Unsung Heroes of the Ancient World
Video.title: Olympians: Ancient Athletic Champions

Image.alt: Olympians: Ancient Athletic Champions
Olympians: Ancient Athletic Champions
Olympians: Ancient Athletic Champions

Video.summary: One of the most fearsome empires in world history, Rome encountered rebellion and resistance from a host of defiant subjects, with the most potent threat being a charismatic and cunning North African prince named Jugurtha.
Video.grandparentTitle: Unsung Heroes of the Ancient World
Video.title: Jugurtha of Numidia: African Freedom Fighter

Image.alt: Jugurtha of Numidia: African Freedom Fighter
Jugurtha of Numidia: African Freedom Fighter
Jugurtha of Numidia: African Freedom Fighter

Video.summary: Survey the Pontic leader’s bloody conquest across Asia Minor and investigate how Rome responded to these burgeoning territorial ambitions, both militarily and politically.
Video.grandparentTitle: Unsung Heroes of the Ancient World
Video.title: Mithridates of Pontus: Rome's Implacable Foe

Image.alt: Mithridates of Pontus: Rome's Implacable Foe
Mithridates of Pontus: Rome's Implacable Foe
Mithridates of Pontus: Rome's Implacable Foe

Video.summary: Among the most influential geographers in antiquity were Strabo and Pausanias. What was the role of the travel writer in antiquity? And how did Strabo and Pausanias revolutionize the craft?
Video.grandparentTitle: Unsung Heroes of the Ancient World
Video.title: Strabo and Pausanias: Describers of the World

Image.alt: Strabo and Pausanias: Describers of the World
Strabo and Pausanias: Describers of the World
Strabo and Pausanias: Describers of the World

Video.summary: By conquering Greece, Philip II of Macedon set the stage for the rise of his son, Alexander the Great.
Video.grandparentTitle: Alexander the Great and the Hellenistic Age
Video.title: Greeks and Macedonians

Image.alt: Greeks and Macedonians
Greeks and Macedonians
Greeks and Macedonians

Video.summary: Alexander's path was prepared by Philip, but few could predict how the son would eclipse the father.
Video.grandparentTitle: Alexander the Great and the Hellenistic Age
Video.title: Alexander the Divine?

Image.alt: Alexander the Divine?
Alexander the Divine?
Alexander the Divine?

Video.summary: Did his Egyptian sojourn teach Alexander the political value of blurring the lines between human and divine?
Video.grandparentTitle: Alexander the Great and the Hellenistic Age
Video.title: The Blazing Star

Image.alt: The Blazing Star
The Blazing Star
The Blazing Star

Video.summary: Can we discern the historical Alexander, or has the myth swallowed the man?
Video.grandparentTitle: Alexander the Great and the Hellenistic Age
Video.title: Alexander—Myth and Reality

Image.alt: Alexander—Myth and Reality
Alexander—Myth and Reality
Alexander—Myth and Reality

Video.summary: Survey the issues you'll consider and the scholars whose theories serve as gateways to exploration.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Fall of the Pagans and the Origins of Medieval Christianity
Video.title: Religious Conflict in the Roman World

Image.alt: Religious Conflict in the Roman World
Religious Conflict in the Roman World
Religious Conflict in the Roman World

Video.summary: Grasp the diverse assortment of religious practices in an empire that ranged from Britain to Egypt.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Fall of the Pagans and the Origins of Medieval Christianity
Video.title: Gods and Their Cities in the Roman Empire

Image.alt: Gods and Their Cities in the Roman Empire
Gods and Their Cities in the Roman Empire
Gods and Their Cities in the Roman Empire

Video.summary: Learn how Rome's first emperor, Augustus, established an institution to venerate an emperor's spirit.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Fall of the Pagans and the Origins of Medieval Christianity
Video.title: The Roman Imperial Cult

Image.alt: The Roman Imperial Cult
The Roman Imperial Cult
The Roman Imperial Cult

Video.summary: Examine cults and the question of whether they formed a bridge between paganism and Christianity.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Fall of the Pagans and the Origins of Medieval Christianity
Video.title: The Mystery Cults

Image.alt: The Mystery Cults
The Mystery Cults
The Mystery Cults
